title: eruca vesicaria var. genuina
intro: Eruca vesicaria var. genuina, also known as wild rocket or rucola, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its peppery leaves and stem. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. Eruca vesicaria var. genuina has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antioxidant in the body. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, capsules, and topical creams, and is often used in cooking as a salad green due to its pungent flavor.
